narrative:
Xenia City 300 (precinct in Greene County) has 467 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.1 percentage points.
